name: Ask Sales V4 curated Mike and Rich authority fresh evaluation 2026-07-22
purpose: Development-only source acceptance set. These prompts validate generalized use of newly supplied direct-authority evidence and are not promotion evidence or a sealed holdout.

prompts.question: A cardiologist works for a hospital and does not own the practice. Does that alone disqualify her from America's Best Doctors?

goldNeeds.text: Decide whether lack of practice ownership alone disqualifies an employed doctor from America's Best Doctors.

prompts.question: On Call 1 I am sure the applicant has no business and is not financially qualified. May I mention price only to screen them out?

goldNeeds.text: Decide whether price may be mentioned on Call 1 when both disqualification conditions are established.

prompts.question: I contacted a lead 14 days ago, logged it in Keap, then spoke to them again today and logged that too. When does my ownership window now expire?

goldNeeds.text: Explain when the 30-day ownership window starts after a later documented contact.

prompts.question: The client just closed and took an available onboarding slot this afternoon. Payment is taken, the contract is signed, and I reviewed and sent the onboarding email. Must I alert fulfillment separately?

goldNeeds.text: Decide whether a separate notification is required after every listed post-sale step is complete for a same-day onboarding booking.

prompts.question: A prospect wants to watch ISTV from a television. Which devices should I tell them can download the app?

goldNeeds.text: Name the supported television device families for downloading the ISTV app.
